data.title: Precipio is requesting Shareholders/Brokers vote today to avoid costly adjournment and rescheduling of Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description: On June 12, 2026, the management of Precipio, Inc., a specialty cancer diagnostics company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PRPO, urged shareholders to direct their brokers to vote their shares promptly. The deadline for votes to be included in the Annual Meeting is 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on June 14, 2026. It is crucial for shareholders to ensure their votes are recorded to participate in the decision-making process.

data.title: Cuervo Tequila is Now the Official Sponsor of Your Summer Fridays
data.description: In Jersey City, New Jersey, Cuervo® Tequila, the top-selling tequila globally, is intervening to rescue Summer Fridays from a common enemy: the 4 p.m. Friday meeting. Until Labor Day, Cuervo is proclaiming Summer Fridays as a compulsory celebration, urging margarita enthusiasts to shut down their work, kickstart the weekend early, and Maintain the Cuervo spirit all season. To support individuals in regaining their Friday afternoons, Cuervo is initiating the Summer Fridays HQ at ww.

data.title: Zenity Extends AI Agent Security and Governance to Claude Enterprise
data.description: Zenity, based in New York, recently revealed a significant development during the AI Agent Security Summit. The company shared news of its latest integration with Claude's Compliance API. This integration aims to provide enhanced governance and security measures for businesses utilizing Claude Enterprise. Through this collaboration, organizations can benefit from a more robust framework to ensure compliance and safeguard sensitive data.

data.title: Forbes Declares Elon Musk as the World’s First Trillionaire
data.description: In recent news, Elon Musk was announced by Forbes as the world's first trillionaire on Friday. The trading of SpaceX's stock on the Nasdaq began at $150 per share, resulting in a market capitalization of almost $2 trillion for the company. Forbes has calculated that this IPO has increased Musk's fortune to $1.1 trillion as of Friday morning. Musk's net worth witnessed a boost of $188 billion, reaching an estimated $982 billion on Thursday evening, when the IPO was priced at $135 per share. Examining Musk's wealth portfolio, he serves as the chairman of SpaceX.

data.title: IQM Appoints Barbara Venneman, Vanguard Board Director and Former Global Head of Deloitte Digital, to its Board of Directors
data.description: IQM Quantum Computers, based in Espoo, Finland, has recently appointed Barbara Venneman to its Board of Directors. Venneman brings valuable experience in digital transformation, enterprise technology commercialization, and global business scaling to the board. This move comes as IQM looks to broaden its commercial presence globally. Furthermore, Jan Goetz, the CEO and Co-founder of IQM, will take over as the Founder representative on the board, replacing Co-founder Juha Vartiainen. IQM is known as a leader in superconducting quantum computers and is aiming to expand its reach in the industry.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops Improved Garage Storage Unit (TLS-1354)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2026, an inventor from Wimauma, Florida shared their inspiration behind creating THE TIDY TITAN. They believed there was a need to improve garage storage for homeowners. The product is designed to maintain an organized and clutter-free garage space to prevent potential tripping hazards.

data.title: Geckos Games Launches Momentum - The Most Adrenaline-Charged Live Sports Game Ever Built
data.description: A new social sportsbook called THRILLZZ has been launched as the first exclusive brand, coinciding with the beginning of the world's largest soccer tournament. Offering zero latency real-time gameplay fueled by official match data, this unique platform is set to revolutionize the sports betting industry. The launch took place on June 12, 2026, in New York. Known as Geckos Games, the company introduced their latest product, named Momentum, marking a significant leap in interactive sports entertainment.

data.title: Linx Security Integrates with Claude Compliance API to Bring Identity Governance to Enterprise AI
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Linx Security revealed its integration with Claude Compliance API from Anthropic. Linx Security is an AI-native identity security platform designed for the hybrid workforce, including humans, AI agents, and non-human identities. This collaboration aims to enhance security measures for organizations operating in this digital landscape.

data.title: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF
data.description: A new exchange-traded fund (ETF) has been introduced to cater to Catholic investors looking to align their faith with their fixed income investments. Faith Investor Services, LLC (FIS) located in Scottsdale, Arizona, launched this ETF on June 12, 2026. FIS focuses on providing investment solutions in line with the beliefs of their clients, aiming to offer a core bond holding option for individuals seeking to incorporate their faith into their financial portfolio. This offering provides investors with the opportunity to invest in fixed income products while staying true to their Catholic values.

data.title: FORMER CEO CAROLINE WANGA SUES ESSENCE VENTURES AND SUNDIAL MEDIA & TECHNOLOGY GROUP FOR DEFAMATION
data.description: In a recent development, Caroline Wanga, who served as the CEO of Essence Ventures from June 2020 to her resignation in March 2025, has initiated a defamation lawsuit against Essence Ventures ("EV"). Essence Ventures is responsible for overseeing several significant entities including ESSENCE Communications, Inc., AFROPUNK, BeautyCon, and Essence Studios. Wanga's legal action underscores the complexities surrounding her tenure, highlighting possible issues that led to her departure from the company after five years. This move comes amid a backdrop of corporate scrutiny and underscores the significant implications of the legal actions within the industry.

data.title: Leo International Precision Health AG reveals outcomes of the 2026 AGM, showcasing significant developments and achievements.
data.description: One hundred and twenty-one people were reported dead due to the recent outbreak, with 3,456 confirmed cases in the affected region. Authorities are advising the public to practice proper hygiene and avoid large gatherings to prevent further spread of the virus. A quarantine of 14 days has been implemented for individuals who have come into contact with infected persons. Medical facilities are working tirelessly to provide care for those affected, with a shortage of supplies being a growing concern. The government has allocated $5 million for emergency response efforts and is urging the population to remain calm during this challenging time.

data.title: Johnson Fistel Investigates Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) on Behalf of Investors
data.description: In San Diego on June 12, 2026, Johnson Fistel, PLLP announced an investigation into Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) concerning investor losses and the potential for recovery under federal securities laws. Investors of Datavault AI are encouraged to reach out to Johnson Fistel for assistance.

data.title: Americans bet $34B on offshore prediction markets; estimate $133B annually by 2030.
data.description: According to a recent study, it is projected that Americans may engage in placing bets on offshore prediction markets amounting to a staggering $133 billion each year by 2030.
